Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF THE SEARCH EXPERIENCE's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's motion for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. "That trial courts are to liberally permit such amendments, at any stage of the proceeding, has been established policy in this state since 1901." (Hirsa v. Sup. Ct. (118 Cal.App.3d 486, 488-89; see also CCP 428.50(c).) A proposed amended complaint's validity is not considered when deciding leave to amend. (See Kittredge Sports Co. v. Sup. Ct. (1989) 213 Cal.App.3d 1045, 1048.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
